meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Project Blocks
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build, validate, and launch your SaaS MVP with expert-level speed.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold micro-SaaS prototypes based on real-time market data. By integrating Antigravity for architectural planning, you transform abstract concepts into functional MVPs in hours, allowing you to validate demand before investing weeks of development time into unproven product concepts.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of every founder's ambition. You have the drive and the technical curiosity, but you are paralyzed by the 'what to build' dilemma. Most founders waste months hunting for a unicorn idea, while the real winners are busy building, failing, and iterating on the front lines of the market.

This isn't about waiting for inspiration; it is about engineering a system that generates demand-driven products. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from stagnation to shipping. We are going to treat your coding environment as a high-velocity lab, turning ideas into revenue-generating assets with surgical precision.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Configure your CLI environment to ensure Claude Code has full read/write access to your workspace for rapid iterative development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current high-growth SaaS categories on Product Hunt and suggest 3 micro-SaaS ideas that solve specific pain points for remote engineering teams.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a robust directory structure that follows industry-standard SaaS patterns, ensuring your code is maintainable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable folder structure for a Next.js 14 SaaS application including authentication, Stripe integration, and database schema management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create the directory structure and base configuration files for a Next.js SaaS app."

steps.title: Domain Logic Injection
steps.description: Translate your validated idea into actionable code by asking Claude to build the core value-add feature immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for a feature that automates API documentation from existing endpoint code, optimizing for developer productivity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write "Implement the core logic for the automated documentation service within the /services directory."

steps.title: Iterative Refinement
steps.description: Use the feedback loop between Claude Code and your local environment to squash bugs and optimize performance in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for potential performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations for database query efficiency.

steps.title: Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Prepare your MVP for production by generating deployment scripts and environment variable configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a production-ready Vercel deployment configuration file including all necessary environment variable placeholders for a SaaS MVP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Generate the vercel.json and deployment documentation for this project."

pro_tips: Treat Claude Code as a junior developer who never sleeps; always ask for a code review after every major function implementation.
Use Antigravity to document your API contracts before you write the logic to ensure type safety across the entire stack.
Force Claude Code to use modular components by explicitly defining the interface boundaries in your initial prompt.
Always maintain a 'scratchpad.md' file where Claude can dump architectural trade-offs so you don't lose context between sessions.
When you hit a bug, paste the terminal error directly into Claude Code; it is optimized to read stack traces faster than any human.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, share it with 5 potential users, and use their feedback to iterate using the same Claude Code workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping products that people actually want to pay for. Your path to profitability starts with a single command. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
